intent: compact term-value reference list for cheatsheet recipe

intent: glossary of defined terms for white-paper recipe
reason: no existing component for labeled definitions with heading eyebrow

intent: metadata summary block for quote recipe (currency, validity, prepared by)
reason: reference-strip is for links not key/value rows

reason: front-matter forces a page break (break_after: always); eyebrow + reference-strip don't compose into a 2-col header strip

intent: business-proposal/one-pager recipe needs same letterhead above hero section
reason: front-matter forces a page break (break_after: always); eyebrow + reference-strip don't compose into a 2-col header strip

intent: formal/noc recipe needs formal-variant letterhead with doc_title NO OBJECTION CERTIFICATE
reason: front-matter forces a page break (break_after: always); eyebrow + reference-strip don't compose into a 2-col header strip

intent: financial/invoice recipe needs commercial-variant letterhead with doc_title INVOICE + brand logo

intent: financial/quote recipe needs commercial-variant letterhead with doc_title QUOTE + brand logo
reason: front-matter forces a page break (break_after: always); eyebrow + reference-strip don't compose into a 2-col header strip

intent: personal/cover-letter recipe (Phase 3 Day 6) needs a personal-identity masthead distinct from letterhead's organizational shape
reason: letterhead schema is organization-centric (company + ref + date); cover-letter is person-centric (name + tagline + contact stack)

intent: personal/cv recipe (Phase 3 later) needs the same personal-identity masthead for the CV header
reason: CV headers share the name+tagline|contact structure with cover-letter; single component serves both

intent: cover-letter subject-line — labeled highlight box with bg + accent border
reason: existing info/warn/danger/tip tones carry status semantics (blue/amber/red/green); subject lines need neutral emphasis

intent: legal/mou non-binding notice — emphasized advisory without status semantic
reason: same non-status-highlight pattern as cover-letter subject line

intent: formal/noc recipe (Day 8) needs 2-party signature grid — primary signatory (HR Manager) + authorised signatory with company stamp
reason: signature-block primitive is single-party; NOC requires two side-by-side signature boxes with independent name/title/email

intent: legal/mou recipe (Phase 3 later) needs 2-party signature grid for Party A + Party B signatories
reason: same N-party-grid pattern as NOC; component serves both formal and legal documents with multiple signatories

intent: cheatsheet — 6 titled cards in 2-col grid (Quick actions, Navigation, Vault, Terminal, Common flags, Troubleshooting)
reason: verified v1 template requires card-grid shape; inlining 6 cards as one raw_body violates density convention

intent: business-proposal/one-pager — 2x2 sections grid (Program scope, Delivery model, Outcomes, Next step)
reason: same card-grid shape, different card count + content — reuses sections-grid directly

intent: tutorial/handoff — contact cards 2x2 grid (Handing off, Taking over, Escalation, On-call)
reason: handoff currently inlines 4 contact cards via inline-styled module raw_body; sections-grid retrofit possible once available

intent: editorial/white-paper — 5-col numeric time-series table (Indicator × 4 years) with alt rows and right-aligned numeric columns
reason: verified v1 .data-table usage; accessible thead/tbody skeleton with per-column align

intent: business-proposal/proposal — 4-col deliverables table (# + Module + Focus + Outcome); multiple instances in the recipe
reason: verified v1 .deliverables-table; same skeleton as white-paper with different column count

intent: financial/invoice — 7-col line-items table (# + Description+sub + Qty + Unit + VAT% + VAT + Total)
reason: verified v1 .items-table; introduces cell sub-line requirement (desc with muted secondary line)

intent: tutorial/onboarding — 3-col 30/60/90 days text-only table (Window + Focus + Signal of success)
reason: verified v1 bare <table>; same skeleton without numeric columns — validates default variant

intent: financial/invoice — totals box (Subtotal / Discount / VAT / Total) with right-aligned numeric rows + accent-bg Total row + optional amount-in-words callout
reason: Day-0 queue item #5; verified v1 .totals-wrap / .totals structure; invoice's structural totals section

intent: financial/quote — totals box (Subtotal / Discount / VAT / Total) with right-aligned numeric rows + accent-bg Total row
reason: same shape as invoice; quote shares the totals structure; compact variant for quote's slimmer layout

intent: numbered legal-clause list for MoU — 7 internal uses (Purpose, Scope, Responsibilities-A, Responsibilities-B, Confidentiality, Term, Governing Law)
reason: v1 mou.en.html uses ol.clauses 7 times; inline density would exceed NOC ceiling of 4. Shape is also used in nda (7×), service-agreement (10×), engagement-letter (1×) — 25 total legal-domain instances. Replaces the original Day-0 queue's recitals-block which assumed a WHEREAS shape that v1 mou doesn't use.

intent: numbered clauses for legal NDA body (7 clauses across confidentiality, permitted-use, exceptions, return, remedies, term, misc)
reason: v1 nda.en.html uses ol.clauses 7 times — same shape as mou. Currently Deferred in Phase-3 triage but validates clause-list as reusable legal primitive beyond mou.

intent: numbered clauses for service-agreement body (scope, payment, IP, warranties, limitations, termination, dispute resolution — 10 instances)
reason: v1 service-agreement.en.html uses ol.clauses 10 times — densest legal-clause user. Currently Deferred but would auto-graduate clause-list when pulled into Phase 4+.
